title: rosmarinus officinalis var. angustifolius
intro: Rosmarinus officinalis var. angustifolius, also known as narrow-leaved rosemary, is a variety of the rosemary plant (Rosmarinus officinalis) native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of narrow-leaved rosemary include improved cognitive function, relief from anxiety and depression, and its potential to reduce the risk of certain diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Narrow-leaved rosemary can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or supplement, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
